entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, career coach turned tech entrepreneur

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, positioned around cognition and quality in hiring

entities.name: Trash Heap Framing
entities.context: V's framing of the prior hiring tools landscape as a trash heap that trained customers to be cynical

entities.name: Cognition and Quality Angle
entities.context: Careerspan's differentiated angle emphasizing cognition and quality over generic B2B SaaS approaches

entities.name: VC Pragmatism
entities.context: Belief that VCs care about portfolio outcomes more than narrative or story

entities.name: Pattern-Based Guidance
entities.context: Coaching style using heuristics and pattern recognition, e.g. fund-size heuristics and pattern-break demos

entities.name: Backflip Metaphor
entities.context: Analogy distinguishing quiet competence from performative setup in professional contexts

entities.name: Adjacent Practice
entities.context: Principle of doing work now that feels like a slice of the desired future, e.g. venture-studio-like activities via coaching

entities.name: GTM Sanity Check
entities.context: Using a collaborator as a sanity check on go-to-market ideas and positioning before committing resources

entities.name: Pitch Artifacts
entities.context: Sharpened deliverables like a packet of candidates designed to create a wow moment for prospects

entities.name: Fund-Size Heuristics
entities.context: Pattern-based rules of thumb related to fund sizes used in coaching guidance

relationships.context: Sees a real differentiated angle for Careerspan around cognition and quality
Frames existing hiring tool landscape as a trash heap breeding customer cynicism
Emphasizes that VCs are pragmatic and outcome-focused
Employs pattern-based coaching style with heuristics and demos
Uses the backflip analogy to illustrate competence vs. performance distinction
Encourages doing present work that resembles slices of the desired future
Coaching and selection work serves as venture-studio-like adjacent practice
Careerspan is positioned against the cynicism created by prior hiring tools
Sanity checking GTM feeds into sharpening pitch artifacts like candidate packets
Leverages pitch artifacts like candidate packets to create wow moments
The cognition angle must be framed in terms of portfolio outcomes to satisfy pragmatic VCs
